name: clipboard-renderer
title: Clipboard Renderer
description: Render Mermaid, LaTeX, and more from your clipboard. LaTeX renders locally; Mermaid uses a local mmdc when available, else mermaid.ink.
author: ksterx

commands.name: render-from-clipboard
commands.title: Render from Clipboard
commands.description: Detect Mermaid code or a LaTeX math expression on the clipboard and render it.

preferences.name: theme
preferences.title: Diagram Theme
preferences.description: Theme used to render the diagram.

preferences.name: mermaidCliPath
preferences.title: Local Mermaid CLI
preferences.description: Optional override. mmdc (@mermaid-js/mermaid-cli) is auto-detected on your PATH; set this to its absolute path only if detection fails. When a local mmdc is used, Mermaid is rendered on-device and nothing leaves your machine. Find the path with `which mmdc`.
